title: present document model proposals to user before implementing
content:
# present document model proposals to user before implementing

Before creating any document model, present the full proposal:
- State schema (global and local if applicable)
- Modules and their operations
- Error types for each operation
- Any architectural decisions (scope choices, object relationships)

Wait for explicit user approval before implementing. This prevents wasted work on wrong assumptions and gives the user a chance to refine the design.

Since [[one operation per user intent keeps concerns separated]], the proposal should show how each user action maps to a specific operation.

---

Topics:
- [[mcp workflows]]
description: Never proceed with document model implementation without explicit user approval of the proposed structure, operations, and modules
